name: Garo Aktiebolag (publ)
summary: Garo Aktiebolag (publ), together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and markets electrical installation materials in Sweden, Norway, Finland, Poland, Ireland, and internationally. Its installation products include plugs and sockets, switches, switchboard GCS, switchboard systems, lightning cabinets, cable cabinets, aluminum enclosures, IT and meter cabinets, meter boards, consumer units, DIN rail components, multiple socket outlets, and KNX products. The company also offers temporary power products, such as fan heaters, workplace light fixtures and fittings, distribution boards, and main and final distribution assemblies; accessories; EV chargers; and car, camping, and marina powers, as well as customized products. It serves electrical wholesalers, electrical installers, original equipment manufacturers, and industrial companies. The company also exports its products. Garo Aktiebolag (publ) was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Gnosj√É¬∂, Sweden.
